text:
Task #2 completed. Cleanup summary:

**Deleted 18 junk markdown files** (ACCESSIBE_FINDINGS, AGENTS, ANDROID_DEPLOYMENT_REPORT, BROWSERSTACK_SETUP, DEV-MODE-SUMMARY, INJECTION_RESEARCH, etc.)

**Deleted 8 junk shell/config files** (auto_debug.sh, create_fresh_cert.sh, debug_workflow.sh, playwright.config.js, etc.)

**Deleted 11 junk scripts** (browserstack_test.py/sh, fix-android-icons.sh, serve_ipa.py, etc.)

**Deleted 5 tracked files that shouldn't exist** (test-date-picker-complete.js, test-showtimes-navigation.js, navigate-to-showtimes.swift, sync-android.sh, indyMobileAdjustmentsExample.ts)

**Deleted 2 backup files** (.swift.backup, .kt.backup)

**Deleted 6 brand-specific Android directories** (cinepolisUSA, brendentheatresconsumer, coralcliffsindyconsumer, yosemite_cinema, nz)

**Kept docs/ directory** - contains legitimate setup docs (APPSTORE_BUILD_SETUP.md, CERTIFICATE_SETUP.md, etc.)

**Kept ios/App/App/Assets.xcassets/** - file-syncer will handle this

**AI/agent trace search**: No references to Claude, AI agent, coding agent, Warp AI, Copilot, ChatGPT, or Anthropic found in any remaining files.

Note: Some scripts under `scripts/` and `www/adjustments/` are reappearing as untracked because the file-syncer is copying them from indy-mobileapps - those are legitimate.
summary: Task #2 complete: all junk files and AI traces removed

text:
Task #1 (Sync core source files) is complete. Here's what was synced from indy-mobileapps to mobile-apps:

**Directories synced:**
- dev-server/adjustments/ (16 files - CSS and JS)
- ios/App/App/Plugins/, Resources/, Assets.xcassets/
- ios/App/App.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj, Podfile, Podfile.lock
- ios/App/App/ individual files (Info.plist, AppDelegate.swift, App.entitlements)
- android/app/src/ (151 files), build.gradle, proguard-rules.pro, multidex-config.*
- www/, fastlane/, github-workflows/, icons/, src-cordova/, assets/

**Files synced:**
- dev-server root: build.js, server.js, package.json, README.md, .gitignore
- src/capacitor-init.ts, src/app-init.ts
- src/plugins/ (all files except indyMobileAdjustmentsExample.ts which was excluded)
- 29 scripts in scripts/
- Root: package.json, package-lock.json, Gemfile, Gemfile.lock, capacitor.config.json, .gitignore, build_number.txt, .ruby-version

**Removed from mobile-apps:**
- src/plugins/indyMobileAdjustmentsExample.ts (already gone)
- test-date-picker-complete.js, test-showtimes-navigation.js, navigate-to-showtimes.swift (already removed by cleaner)

**Cleanup done:**
- Removed .claude/ and logs/ directories that were accidentally present in source Assets.xcassets
- No .backup files present in the destination

All verification checks pass.
summary: Task 1 complete - all files synced successfully

text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Write clean CLAUDE.md for mobile-apps","description":"Write a clean CLAUDE.md for /Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/CLAUDE.md based on the one from indy-mobileapps but updated for the mobile-apps context (it's a subfolder of indy-frontend, not standalone).

The CLAUDE.md should cover:
1. CSS/JS workflow (edit in dev-server/adjustments/, run npm run run)
2. Project overview - Capacitor app serving 100+ cinema brands
3. Key commands
4. Architecture (how injection works)
5. Dev mode (hot reload)
6. Brand configuration (configure-capacitor-app.sh)
7. Troubleshooting tips
8. CI/CD notes
9. Goals section: CSS/JS adjustments should be universal across all brands, no brand-specific branches needed

Add a section about the project goals:
- The CSS/JS adjustments need to cope with every brand universally
- The configure-capacitor-app.sh script handles brand-specific config (app ID, name, URL, colors, icons)
- We don't control the webapp codebase, so we fix issues via CSS/JS injection after page load
- The custom plugin (IndyMobileAdjustmentsPlugin) handles injection on both iOS and Android
- Goal is to automate releases: just run configure script for a brand and release

Do NOT include any references to Claude, AI agents, or coding assistants.
Remove the "Taking Screenshots (For Claude Code)" section.
Remove any Tailscale or personal machine references.

Use the existing CLAUDE.md in mobile-apps as a base (it's already cleaner), but make sure it includes everything relevant from the indy-mobileapps version.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-06T17:55:13.897Z"}

Task #4 complete. Here is the full report:

## Step 1: .gitignore
All required entries verified. Added 6 missing entries:
- `.claude/`
- `.mcp.json`
- `.playwright-mcp/`
- `logs/`
- `screenshots/`
- `*.backup`

All other required entries were already present (`.idea/`, `.vscode/`, `PLANNING.md`, `TASKS.md`, `WARP.md`, `node_modules/`, `vendor/`, `.DS_Store`, `*.log`, `.env`, credentials, iOS/Android build artifacts, fastlane artifacts, `www/*` with exceptions, `*.cer`, `*_base64.txt`, `android_keys.txt`, `android-app-signing`, `*.swift.backup`, `*.kt.backup`, `firebase-service-credentials.json`).

## Step 2: Junk files
Root directory is clean. Only legitimate files/dirs present:
- CLAUDE.md, package.json, package-lock.json, Gemfile, Gemfile.lock, capacitor.config.json, .gitignore, .ruby-version, build_number.txt
- Directories: android/, assets/, dev-server/, docs/, fastlane/, github-workflows/, icons/, ios/, scripts/, src/, src-cordova/, www/
- Also present but fine: .bundle/ (Ruby bundler), node_modules/, vendor/

None of the banned files exist (no *_REPORT.md, *_FINDINGS.md, *_SETUP.md in root, no test-*.js, no tests/, screenshots/, logs/, .claude/, .mcp.json, .playwright-mcp/, android-app-signing/, WARP.md, AGENTS.md, PLANNING.md, TASKS.md, PROMPT_TEMPLATE.md, *.backup, navigate-to-showtimes.swift, sync-android.sh).

## Step 3: AI/agent references
- Found and fixed: `scripts/screenshot.sh` had "Screenshot helper for Claude Code" -- changed to "Screenshot helper"
- `.gitignore` mentions "WARP.md" (intentional, it's gitignoring it)
- No matches for: anthropic, copilot, chatgpt, coding agent, AI agent, Co-Authored-By
- CLAUDE.md intentionally kept (our config file)

## Step 4: Key files from indy-mobileapps
3 files were MISSING and have been copied from the source repo:
- `dev-server/adjustments/css/checkout-fixes.css`
- `dev-server/adjustments/css/membership-fixes.css`
- `dev-server/adjustments/js/tab-navigation.js`

All 14 critical files now verified present.

## Step 5: capacitor.config.json
Uses generic Indy bundle ID: `com.indycinemagroup.indy` with appName "Indy". Not brand-specific.

## Step 6: package.json scripts
All required scripts present:
- `run` (builds adjustments, syncs, runs iOS)
- `run:android` (builds adjustments, syncs, runs Android)
- `build:adjustments` (builds dev-server adjustments)
- `dev-server` (starts dev server)
- `dev:ios` (dev mode iOS)
- `finalize:bundle` (bundles for release)

Files modified:
- `/Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/.gitignore` (added 6 entries)
- `/Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/scripts/screenshot.sh` (removed "Claude Code" reference)

Files added (copied from source):
- `/Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/dev-server/adjustments/css/checkout-fixes.css`
- `/Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/dev-server/adjustments/css/membership-fixes.css`
- `/Users/ggomes/dev/indy-frontend/mobile-apps/dev-server/adjustments/js/tab-navigation.js`
summary: Task 4 complete - gitignore and verification report
